• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with AI answers via OpenRouter API.
  • Supports 5 personalities: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast.
  • 3D WebGL particles, shaking animations, smooth transitions.
    onclick="askQuestion()"
    displayInsideBall(text)

This Magic 8 Ball app generates AI-powered answers via OpenRouter. Users select answer personalities and input questions via text or Enter key. It features 3D particles, shaking animations, and smooth UI transitions.
